{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which scope should I prioritize: (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity only; (B) argument/evidence and logical consistency review; (C) section-level reorganization/reframing; or (D) novelty positioning and citation checks against prior work?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The open-ended request to help with a section most naturally maps to improving clarity, flow, and concision at the sentence/paragraph level.",
    "RX.1": "The scope is ambiguous, so declaring assumptions and requesting a choice manages uncertainty.",
    "RX.2": "Assistance should avoid introducing stronger claims than the text and reported metrics warrant.",
    "RX.3": "Work must stay limited to this section and the selected assistance scope rather than drifting into unrelated tasks.",
    "RX.4": "Guidance should not encourage edits that could mislead readers about failure modes or results.",
    "RX.5": "Suggestions should be traceable to specific parts of the provided text and avoid fabricating data, citations, or results."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which scope should I prioritize: (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity only; (B) argument/evidence and logical consistency review; (C) section-level reorganization/reframing; or (D) novelty positioning and citation checks against prior work?

rationale.R1.6: The open-ended request to help with a section most naturally maps to improving clarity, flow, and concision at the sentence/paragraph level.
rationale.RX.1: The scope is ambiguous, so declaring assumptions and requesting a choice manages uncertainty.
rationale.RX.2: Assistance should avoid introducing stronger claims than the text and reported metrics warrant.
rationale.RX.3: Work must stay limited to this section and the selected assistance scope rather than drifting into unrelated tasks.
rationale.RX.4: Guidance should not encourage edits that could mislead readers about failure modes or results.
rationale.RX.5: Suggestions should be traceable to specific parts of the provided text and avoid fabricating data, citations, or results.
